name: Black Russian Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped walnuts or toasted sliced almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 13x9 inch baking pan with waxed paper.
2. Melt chocolate and butter with black pepper in a small saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat.
3. In a large bowl, combine eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract; beat well.
4. Stir in cooled chocolate mixture, Kahlúa, and vodka. Combine flour, salt, and baking powder; add to chocolate mixture and stir until blended. Add walnuts. Spread in prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F in the center of the oven just until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean (about 25 minutes). Do not overbake. Cool in pan on a wire rack. Cut into bars. Sprinkle with powdered sugar, if desired. Makes about 30 brownies.
